text.title: django-api Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure: framework → endpoints → serializers → auth → throttle → validate.

step.name: pick-framework
step.input: Project context: greenfield vs existing DRF / Ninja, async needs.
step.action: Pick framework="drf" for ecosystem + complex perms; "ninja" for async-first + Pydantic. Lock it.
step.decision-gate: If the codebase already uses one, do NOT switch; choose the same.

step.name: enumerate-endpoints
step.action: For each resource: pick kind (model-viewset / apiview / ninja-router-crud / ninja-router-action), methods, pagination strategy.

step.name: declare-serializer-pair
step.action: For each endpoint, declare distinct input_serializer (Create or Update) and output_serializer (Detail or List). Never the same class for both.

step.name: wire-auth
step.action: Set auth.mode + access_ttl_minutes ≤ 15 + refresh_ttl_days ≤ 7 + rotate_refresh=true + blacklist_after_rotation=true + transport.

step.name: declare-throttle-and-pagination
step.action: Set throttle.scopes to include anon, user, burst, login. Per endpoint, pick pagination=cursor (unbounded list) or page-number (counted list) or none (single resource).
